description: Sierra provides an AI agent platform for customer experience teams and developers to build and operate customer-facing agents across channels. Its public website describes products such as Agent SDK and Agent Studio for building, integrating, and managing those agents.
summary: sierra.chat exposes publicly accessible MCP servers for specific brand agents (confirmed: Vivid Seats, Redfin, Remitly); no public REST, GraphQL, or CLI developer surface was found on the domain.
